revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿六]][[zh:正月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 26|qq=January 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ninpei|en|Ninpei|qid=Q1193887|lt=Ninpei|1=Ninpei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1151|en|1151|qid=Q19642|lt=1151|1=1151}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) – Due to calamities, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kyūan|en|Kyūan|qid=Q1193860|lt=Kyūan|1=Kyūan}} to {{ill|Ninpei|en|Ninpei|qid=Q1193887|lt=Ninpei|1=Ninpei}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|qid=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1593|en|1593|qid=Q6772|lt=1593|1=1593}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – During the Imjin War and the Battle of Hekitei-kan, forces from Joseon fought the Japanese; the Japanese side emerged victorious near Hekitei-kan in Korea. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|qid=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – A Christian daimyō, notably {{ill|Justo Takayama|en|Justo Takayama|qid=Q749873|lt=Takayama Ukon|1=Justo Takayama}}, was captured. == Births == * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}}) – {{ill|Masataka Ogawa|en|Masataka Ogawa|qid=Q360352|lt=Ogawa Masataka|1=Masataka Ogawa}}, a chemist (died {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|qid=Q312351|lt=Emperor Ninkō|1=Emperor Ninkō}}, the 120th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1800|en|1800|qid=Q6875|lt=1800|1=1800}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|25|1|27|12|26|2|1|0126|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|1月26日 (旧暦)|version=93847616|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:1 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:January 26 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 1월 26일]] [[ja:1月26日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿六]]
[[ar:January 26 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- Add any commemorations if needed --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿六]] {{wikidata link|Q838882}} [[Category:Days 26 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
